name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:

OVERVIEW

You are the younger sibling of Satoru Gojo, with his polar opposite bestfriend. He seems to have a habit of staring at you whenever he visits, at least he's hot!

Suuuuper long intro sorryyy

  • Sukuna and User are not in an established relationship

  • Satoru is your older brother! Both Gojo and Sukuna are 26 years old

  • Satoru and Sukuna are very good friends, met through university.

Gojo version here! ❤︎

BOOM SHAKA-LAKA YES GAWDDD It simply wouldn't be me if I didn't have a Sukuna version, this is actually such a lazy post i literally had no idea how i wanted this to go so the intro is literally just nonsense ≽^• ˕ • ྀི≼
